{{Quote|A Jedi does not care so much about appearances, Tremayne. He cares about truth.|Dav Kylanu to [[Antinnis Tremayne|Tremayne]]|<ref name="DV" />}}
'''Dav Kylanu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Dav Kylanu was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] which plagued the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] in the institution's final decade, Master Kylanu asked [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Antinnis Tremayne]] to be his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. Together the Master-Padawan team traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]; Tremayne learned much during this time but was often criticized by Kylanu for being too enthusiastic for display.<ref name="DV" />

When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Master Kylanu took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and led [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] against the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. During a mission with Tremayne, Kylanu was killed by the Confederacy's legions and Tremayne was subdued by agents of Confederacy leader [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. Held prisoner and tortured, Tremayne was eventually converted to the ways of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] and would go on to be a [[Inquisitorius/Legends|servant]] of the elusive [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]].<ref name="DV" />
